name: chatgpt-codex-self-improving-skills
description: Hermes-inspired self-improvement loop for Codex skills, with non-blocking background reviews, telemetry, backups, and curator tooling.

interface.shortDescription: Review turns and maintain Codex skills safely
interface.longDescription: Codex Self Improvement packages a Hermes-inspired learning loop: lifecycle hooks record tool usage and queue non-blocking background reviews by default, skills guide safe skill updates, and a local skill manager keeps backups, provenance, pins, archives, and curator reports.
defaultPrompt: Run a self-improvement review for this thread.
Curate my Codex skills in dry-run mode.
Create a reusable skill from this workflow.
